00

feast or famine, anon?

1

Welcome to Crypto Island

crypto island was supposed to be a week-long hangout of carefree fun. celebrities, influencers, founders, investors, and everyone in-between came to the island expecting luxury. little did they know, the island would become home.

2

End of Modern Civilization

while the party raged on crypto island, nuclear war ended modern civilization in a matter of hours. satellite tv broadcast the last images of the end of the world, and some on the island watched.

3

Survive

10,000 crypto junkies are now stuck on an island to fend for themselves. supplies are gone. morale is nonexistent. alliances are being created, but it's every man and woman for themselves. the island is inhospitable. lives of luxury and meme-ing have not prepared the crypto degenerates for how to handle this scenario. and in the chaos and fear of finding how to survive, it's become quite clear - food is scarce.

4

Project Divinity

The island is not what it seems. Maps have been discovered, secret files uncovered, and encrypted messages and phone calls are circulating. The island no longer feels like a place whose sole intention was fun. Someone is pulling the strings, and the puppets don’t even know they’re part of the show.

welcome to the cannibals

the classes

No items found.
